Reduced Inequalities.reason: Teaches the creation of '風險計量模型' (risk measurement models), which are essential tools for improving the regulation and monitoring of financial markets (Target 10.5).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Skills in building '風險計量模型' (risk measurement models) can contribute to creating more transparent and accountable financial institutions (Target 16.6), but this is not a primary focus.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course uses the open-source 'QuantLib' library, promoting knowledge sharing (Target 17.6), and builds risk modeling skills, contributing to macroeconomic stability (Target 17.13).
